prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别约8488→7958→7655→9940→13359名，2021–2023年逐年小幅前移，2024年起大幅后移，近两年累计后移约5700名；2025年基准位次约13359名；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划：2021年180人、2022年182人、2023年180人、2024年177人、2025年172人，呈缓慢缩减趋势；2026年计划205人，较2025年扩招约19.2%，扩招幅度较大，理论上会缓解部分竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第39名，近年稳定在38–41名区间，属于国内顶尖理工类院校，在电子信息领域享有极高声誉；该校2022年曾因学生学术不端事件出现偏负面舆情，2025年有校园安全相关负面信号；抖音综合热度排名第60位（较热），短视频曝光量中等；整体声誉偏负面但未出现明显断档或报考恐慌信号，对报考热度影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A、机械工程A-，共5个学科达A-及以上，电子信息与计算机领域实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息类、计算机类为当前社会高热专业，就业前景好，报考热度持续走高；江苏省物理类考生数从2021年16.6万持续增长至2025年26.1万，2026年总考生52.1万，按近年物理类占比约72%估算约37.5万人，较2025年增长约44%，竞争显著加剧；省控线数据已纳入参考，物理类本科批从2021年417分升至2025年463分，整体难度稳定；西安电子科技大学位于陕西省西安市，非江苏本地高校，无本省招生倾斜；该校在江苏招生计划占其总计划比例不高，地域偏好因素影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年大幅后移趋势、2026年扩招约19.2%的缓解效应、江苏省物理类考生规模大幅增长约44%带来的竞争加剧、电子信息与计算机类专业持续高热、学校声誉偏负面但影响有限等因素，判断2026年位次将继续后移但幅度收窄。预测最低位次约14947名，区间14447–15447名。

- 电子信息类（创新实验班）
- 计算机类（创新实验班）
- 计算机科学与技术（国家拔尖基地班）。

- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程）

- 计算机类（网络安全）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14947名，区间14447–15447名。位次在此区间内的考生，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间上限（如14000名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（卓越计划实验班、创新实验班等）；位次接近区间下限（如15500名左右）应以三档管理科学与工程类保底，二档专业仍有较大录取机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 8488 → 7958 → 7655 → 9940 → 13359, with a slight upward trend from 2021 to 2023, a significant downward trend starting in 2024, and a cumulative decline of about 5700 positions in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13359; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province: 180 in 2021, 182 in 2022, 180 in 2023, 177 in 2024, 172 in 2025, showing a slow reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 205, an increase of about 19.2% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and theoretically will alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 39th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 38–41 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic science and engineering institutions, with a very high reputation in the field of electronic information; in 2022, there was a negative public opinion incident due to student academic misconduct, and in 2025, there were negative signals related to campus safety; its comprehensive popularity on Douyin ranks 60th (relatively popular), with moderate short video exposure; overall reputation is slightly negative but without obvious gaps or panic signals for applications, having limited impact on application enthusiasm; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, Mechanical Engineering A-, a total of 5 disciplines reaching A- or above, with top national strength in electronic information and computer fields, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic information and computer majors are currently highly popular in society, with good employment prospects and continuously rising application enthusiasm; the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province has grown from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, with a total of 521,000 candidates in 2026, estimated at about 375,000 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 72%, an increase of about 44% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; provincial control line data has been included for reference, with the Physics Category undergraduate batch rising from 417 points in 2021 to 463 points in 2025, indicating stable overall difficulty; Xidian University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, not a local university in Jiangsu, with no provincial enrollment preference; the university's enrollment plan in Jiangsu accounts for a low proportion of its total plan, with neutral regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the mitigating effect of the approximately 19.2% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to the substantial increase of about 44% in the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province, the sustained high popularity of electronic information and computer majors, and the limited impact of the university's slightly negative reputation, it is judged that the ranking in 2026 will continue to decline but at a reduced rate. The predicted minimum ranking is about 14947, with a range of 14447–15447.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer (Innovation Experimental Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (National Top-Notch Base Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digital and Business Intelligence Integrated Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 14947, range 14447–15447. Candidates within this ranking range are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; candidates with rankings significantly above the upper limit (e.g., within 14000) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Excellence Program Experimental Class, Innovation Experimental Class, etc.); candidates with rankings near the lower limit (e.g., around 15500) should use Tier 3 Management Science and Engineering as a safety, while Tier 2 majors still have a good chance of admission.
